# scoop-charly

> Scoop bucket for charly-vibes tools. Install wai, fabbro, and fotos on Windows via Scoop.

## Setup

```
scoop bucket add charly-vibes https://github.com/charly-vibes/scoop-charly
scoop install wai
scoop install fabbro
```

## Authorship

All code in this repository was generated by a large language model. Human contribution: requirements, design decisions, planning, and review.

Leer en español: https://charly-vibes.github.io/charly-vibes/
